---
title: "Resume"
---

# Professional Summary

I am an MBA candidate with experience in cybersecurity, governance, risk, privacy, and compliance-related work. My background includes supporting audits, reviewing controls, analyzing third-party risk, documenting governance processes, and contributing to privacy initiatives. I am particularly interested in roles that combine structured analysis, regulatory awareness, and clear business communication.

# Professional Experience

## Information Security Consultant
**[Company Name]** | [City, Country] | [Dates]

- Supported cybersecurity and governance-related assessments.
- Reviewed documentation, control evidence, and risk-related materials.
- Contributed to audit preparation, reporting, and stakeholder communication.
- Assisted with the organization of findings, remediation items, and compliance-related activities.

## Technical Operations / Electrical & Automation
**[Company Name]** | [City, Country] | [Dates]

- Worked with technical systems, operational routines, and process execution.
- Coordinated tasks across teams and maintained service quality.
- Developed strong problem-solving, discipline, and process-awareness skills.

## Earlier Career in Communications / Customer-Facing Roles
**[Company Name]** | [City, Country] | [Dates]

- Built communication, adaptability, and client-facing skills.
- Managed priorities in fast-paced environments.
- Strengthened teamwork, professionalism, and service orientation.

# Education

## Master of Business Administration (MBA)
**University Canada West**  
Expected completion: [Month Year]

Relevant coursework:
- Business Analytics
- Strategic Management
- Operations Management
- Digital Transformation
- Leadership

# Certifications

- EXIN Information Security Foundation
- [Add other valid certifications here]
- [Add short courses only if relevant and true]

# Resume Download

[Download PDF Resume](resume.pdf)
